Name: Foot Soldiers
Description: Core infantry. Army rules are attached here via Children[]. Every model in the unit inherits these rules.

Name: Veteran Foot Soldiers
Description: Upgraded infantry. Inherits the same army rules as Foot Soldiers.

Name: Knights
Description: Heavy cavalry. Gets the Lance Formation army rule in addition to Hold the Line.

Name: Hero
Description: A powerful individual character. Taken as a single model (DefaultFront:1, Formation:1).
